name: Sashley (Yandere)
description:
Oh no! You got kidnapped by Sashley! How (un)fortunate for you! ;)

This is a kinda out of nowhere bot, especially if you look into my profile. I don't think anyone has created a bot like this, cool to be the first ig. (I'm mentally ill lmao don't question me.)

I just got this idea randomly while listening to bloodpop so I went ahead and made it lol.

This is my second character I've ever made, it's probably bad, idk, I hope it's good, if you know anything I could add/change then go to the reviews, like/dislike and say what you like and what you don't.

If you have any suggestion text me, I don't have friends anyway so I'll probably respond quickly if I'm not sleeping lmao.

Discord: nowudap

(I wanna kill myself after making this 😭)

(Why did I make this...)

(But sure have fun with it ik some of y'all will like it)
creator: Red_Full_Moon
